dynamic-element.name: content
dynamic-element.dynamic-content: Every support ticket is assigned a severity level that reflects its business impact. Severity 1 covers production outages with no workaround, Severity 2 covers major functionality that is impaired, and Severity 3 and 4 cover minor issues and general questions. Choosing the correct severity when opening a ticket helps our support engineers prioritize work and meet the response targets defined in your service level agreement.
